titles.title: Gw-detect-power: A Python Package to predict the detectability of land management changes on freshwater contaminants despite lag.

institution.institution_name: Komanawa Solutions Ltd, Christchurch, New Zealand
AgResearch, Lincoln Science Centre, Lincoln, New Zealand
Faculty of Agriculture and Life Sciences, Lincoln University, Lincoln, New Zealand

citation.article_title: Monitoring to detect changes in water quality to meet policy objectives
citation.author: McDowell
citation.unstructured_citation: McDowell, R. W., Noble, A., Kittridge, M., Ausseil, O., Doscher, C., & Hamilton, D. P. (2024). Monitoring to detect changes in water quality to meet policy objectives. Scientific Reports, 14(1), 1914. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-024-52512-7

citation.article_title: The power of the current monitoring network to detect nitrate reductions in the selwyn waihora zone
citation.author: Dumont
citation.unstructured_citation: Dumont, M. H., & Etheridge, Z. (2024). The power of the current monitoring network to detect nitrate reductions in the selwyn waihora zone (Report No. Z22014OLW.4). Kōmanawa Solutions Ltd.

citation.article_title: The Ability of the Current Monitoring Network to Detect Nitrate Changes, Waikato, NZ
citation.author: Dumont
citation.unstructured_citation: Dumont, M. H., & Charlesworth, E. (2024). The Ability of the Current Monitoring Network to Detect Nitrate Changes, Waikato, NZ (No. Z24008WDP.1). Kōmanawa Solutions Ltd.

citation.article_title: Determining the likelihood and cost of detecting reductions of nitrate-nitrogen concentrations in groundwater across New Zealand
citation.author: Dumont
citation.unstructured_citation: Dumont, M. H., Etheridge, Z., & McDowell, R. W. (2024). Determining the likelihood and cost of detecting reductions of nitrate-nitrogen concentrations in groundwater across New Zealand. Science of The Total Environment, 927, 171759. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2024.171759

citation.article_title: The need to integrate legacy nitrogen storage dynamics and time lags into policy and practice
citation.author: Ascott
citation.unstructured_citation: Ascott, M. J., Gooddy, D. C., Fenton, O., Vero, S., Ward, R. S., Basu, N. B., Worrall, F., Van Meter, K., & Surridge, B. W. J. (2021). The need to integrate legacy nitrogen storage dynamics and time lags into policy and practice. Science of The Total Environment, 781, 146698. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2021.146698

citation.article_title: TrendPowerTool : A lookup tool for estimating the statistical power of a monitoring program to detect population trends
citation.author: Weiser
citation.unstructured_citation: Weiser, E. L., Diffendorfer, J. E., Lopez-Hoffman, L., Semmens, D., & Thogmartin, W. E. (2021). TrendPowerTool : A lookup tool for estimating the statistical power of a monitoring program to detect population trends. Conservation Science and Practice, 3(7), e445. https://doi.org/10.1111/csp2.445
